topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Alliance Duel Guide — Schedule, Day 1–6 Plan, and VS Strategy
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-17: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: This is a strong page-level opportunity with meaningful impressions and clicks, and the target page already matches the event-guide archetype in the Events cluster. The request is focused on improving query-to-page alignment and first-screen usefulness rather than creating a new page, which fits the guardrails. Prior run `2026-05-10-alliance-duel-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Better match for last z vs schedule intent, faster event navigation, and clearer Day 1 to Day 6 planning for players searching the guide.
topics.duplication_risk: Low. The proposal points to an existing canonical page and does not suggest a new competing guide.
claims_to_verify: Whether alliance-duel.html is still the best canonical page for the target query intent.
Whether any proposed content changes stay within approved scope and do not blur event cluster roles.
topics.next_step: Send to human review for scope confirmation against the existing event-guide template and cluster separation rules.
evidence: GSC page signal: alliance-duel.html had 8912 impressions, 434 clicks, 4.87% CTR, avg position 6.10.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z vs schedule` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `event-guide` in the `Events` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

closeout.note: Owner approved exact Alliance Duel schedule/content intent changes. Manual apply was used for first-screen/meta operations, followed by strict QA.

topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Redeem Codes — Active Codes, Gift Center Login, and UID
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-17: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: This is the strongest signal in the set because the page already has significant impressions with low CTR and multiple low-CTR gift center queries. The page is a canonical cornerstone guide in Economy, so a careful update may improve query match and first-screen clarity without requiring structural changes. Prior run `2026-05-05-codes-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Better support for players searching for Gift Center login, UID, and redeem flow help, while keeping them on the correct canonical page.
topics.duplication_risk: Medium. Gift Center intent can overlap with other economy pages, so role separation must be checked carefully.
claims_to_verify: Whether codes.html remains the correct canonical page for gift center intent.
Whether the proposed update preserves gift-center-only-redeem-flow, gift-rewards-mailbox, and gift-center-cluster-role-separation claims.
Whether any content changes would require moving the user to another canonical page instead.
topics.next_step: Escalate for human review with a tight scope check focused on canonical claims and cluster separation.
evidence: GSC page signal: codes.html had 40033 impressions, 733 clicks, 1.83% CTR, avg position 6.01.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center` had 3169 impressions, 121 clicks, 3.82% CTR, position 6.58.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center login` had 903 impressions, 46 clicks, 5.09% CTR, position 5.14.
Low CTR query: `lastz gift center` had 683 impressions, 29 clicks, 4.25% CTR, position 5.96.
Low CTR query: `last-z.com gift center` had 508 impressions, 25 clicks, 4.92% CTR, position 6.00.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z gift center` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `cornerstone-guide` in the `Economy` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-only-redeem-flow`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-rewards-mailbox`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-cluster-role-separation`.
Existing backlog history for this page: gift-center-ctr-pass:done.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

closeout.note: Owner-reviewed no-op proposal. Current codes.html first-screen and metadata already match the intended codes hub role; no content change applied.
